interfaces.name: PlaceID
interfaces.signature: struct PlaceID: Hashable, Codable, Sendable { let rawValue: UUID }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Replaces bare UUID at all cross-entity boundaries to prevent id mixups.

interfaces.name: CaptureSource
interfaces.signature: enum CaptureSource: String, Codable, Sendable { case manualPin, shareExtension, camera, siriIntent }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. No 'widget' case — a widget tap opens Home, it doesn't itself originate a capture; the resulting save is manualPin.

interfaces.name: PlaceRecord
interfaces.signature: struct PlaceRecord: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: PlaceID; var title: String; var latitude: Double; var longitude: Double; var radiusMeters: Double; var captureSource: CaptureSource; var capturedAt: Date; var updatedAt: Date; var noteText: String?; var photoAssetIdentifier: String?; var voiceNoteURL: URL?; var manuallyPromotedUntil: Date?; var snoozedUntil: Date?; var dismissedAt: Date?; var visitedAt: Date?; var lastNotificationAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Durable facts only, never a stored 'currentState'. Plain Sendable struct — NSManagedObject never crosses out of the persistence layer.

interfaces.name: UserActionKind
interfaces.signature: enum UserActionKind: String, Codable, Sendable { case save, rename, snooze, dismiss, markVisited, reactivate, manualPromote, undoSave, mergeAccepted, separateDuplicate }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. reactivate/manualPromote are the actions that clear requiresManualReactivation on the latest MonitoringDecisionRecord for a place.

interfaces.name: UserActionEvent
interfaces.signature: struct UserActionEvent: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let placeID: PlaceID; let action: UserActionKind; let timestamp: Date; let sourceSurface: String; let metadata: [String: String] }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Append-only audit log entry; feeds Diagnostics and the PlaceTimelineEvent narrative.

interfaces.name: NotificationResolution
interfaces.signature: enum NotificationResolution: String, Codable, Sendable { case snoozed, dismissed, visited, opened, ignored, autoSoftPaused }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. autoSoftPaused marks the episode that, after ~a day unresolved, causes MonitoringEngine to write a .queue disposition with requiresManualReactivation: true.

interfaces.name: NotificationEpisode
interfaces.signature: struct NotificationEpisode: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let placeID: PlaceID; let notificationID: String; let firedAt: Date; var resolvedAt: Date?; var resolution: NotificationResolution? }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. One row per one-shot-per-episode notification; unresolved age (via the notificationEpisodes evaluate() parameter) is what drives soft-pause.

interfaces.name: PausedReason
interfaces.signature: enum PausedReason: String, Codable, Sendable { case permissionRevoked, notificationsDisabled, forceQuitAwaitingReopen, rebootReregistering, preciseLocationReduced, noFreshLocation, softPausedAfterNoResponse }
interfaces.notes: User-visible degraded-state reasons.

interfaces.name: PlaceDisplayState
interfaces.signature: enum PlaceDisplayState: Equatable, Sendable { case active(reason: String), queued(reason: String), paused(reason: PausedReason, message: String), snoozed(until: Date, message: String), visited(message: String), dismissed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: Derived state consumed by UI. UI must not derive this itself.

interfaces.name: MonitoringDisposition
interfaces.signature: enum MonitoringDisposition: String, Codable, Sendable { case monitor, queue, pause }
interfaces.notes: FINAL, locked at exactly 3 cases. Soft-pause-after-no-response is disposition .queue plus MonitoringDecisionRecord.requiresManualReactivation = true, not a 4th disposition.

interfaces.name: MonitoringDecision
interfaces.signature: struct MonitoringDecision: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let placeID: PlaceID; let evaluatedAt: Date; let score: Double; let disposition: MonitoringDisposition; let reasonCode: String; let reasonText: String; let consumedRegionSlot: Bool; let rankingInputs: [String: String] }
interfaces.notes: Persisted audit trail and current diagnostics basis.

interfaces.name: AppCapabilitySnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct AppCapabilitySnapshot: Equatable, Codable, Sendable { var locationAuthorization: LocationAuthLevel; var isPreciseLocation: Bool; var notificationAuthorization: NotificationAuthLevel; var isForceQuitAwaitingReopen: Bool; var isReregisteringAfterReboot: Bool; var monitoredRegionCount: Int; var effectiveMonitoringCap: Int; var lastSyncAt: Date? }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Single capability truth, computed by one service, read by Home/Library/Diagnostics. isPreciseLocation:false surfaces via DiagnosticsSummaryTier.capabilityReduced and Home's degraded copy, never as a per-place paused reason.

interfaces.name: CaptureRequest
interfaces.signature: struct CaptureRequest: Sendable { var title: String?; var coordinate: (latitude: Double, longitude: Double)?; var source: CaptureSource; var noteText: String?; var photoAssetID: String?; var voiceMemoURL: URL?; var capturedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Cross-surface capture API used by app and extensions.

interfaces.name: CaptureResult
interfaces.signature: struct CaptureResult: Sendable { let placeID: PlaceID; let persistedTitle: String; let displayState: PlaceDerivedState; let confirmationMessage: String }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Returned only after persistence succeeds; drives the receipt toast for both Home and Share Extension.

interfaces.name: PlaceRepositoryProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol PlaceRepositoryProtocol: Sendable { func saveCapture(_ draft: PlaceDraft) async throws -> CaptureResult; func fetchAllPlaces() async throws -> [PlaceRecord]; func fetchPlace(id: PlaceID) async throws -> PlaceRecord?; func updatePlace(_ place: PlaceRecord) async throws; func appendUserAction(_ event: UserActionEvent) async throws; func appendNotificationEpisode(_ episode: NotificationEpisode) async throws; func appendMonitoringDecision(_ decision: MonitoringDecisionRecord) async throws; func fetchLatestDecision(for placeID: PlaceID) async throws -> MonitoringDecisionRecord?; func timeline(for placeID: PlaceID) async throws -> [PlaceTimelineEvent] }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. saveCapture returns CaptureResult, not bare PlaceRecord. Commit is synchronous/durable before success is surfaced. If commit succeeds but monitoring/notification-category setup fails afterward, still returns success with a degraded displayState and honest confirmation copy — never an error implying the save itself failed.

interfaces.name: PlaceStateDeriver
interfaces.signature: protocol PlaceStateDeriver: Sendable { func deriveState(for place: PlaceRecord, latestDecision: MonitoringDecision?, capability: AppCapabilitySnapshot, now: Date) -> PlaceDisplayState }
interfaces.notes: Pure derivation contract.

interfaces.name: MonitoringEngineProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol MonitoringEngineProtocol: Sendable { func evaluate(places: [PlaceRecord], capability: AppCapabilitySnapshot, effectiveMonitoringCap: Int, recentActions: [UserActionEvent], notificationEpisodes: [NotificationEpisode], now: Date) -> [MonitoringDecisionRecord] }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. notificationEpisodes is explicit input — the engine can't detect a day-scale unresolved episode from recentActions alone. Pure function; never touches CoreLocation or StoreKit directly.

interfaces.name: LocationProviding
interfaces.signature: protocol LocationProviding: AnyObject, Sendable { var delegate: LocationProvidingDelegate? { get set }; var monitoredRegions: Set<CLRegion> { get }; func requestWhenInUseAuthorization(); func requestAlwaysAuthorization(); func requestTemporaryFullAccuracyAuthorization() async; func startMonitoring(for region: CLCircularRegion); func stopMonitoring(for region: CLCircularRegion); func currentAuthorizationSnapshot() async -> AppCapabilitySnapshot; func lastKnownCoordinate() async -> (latitude: Double, longitude: Double)? }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. The one place CoreLocation types are allowed to appear directly. Fake implementation simulates region entry/exit/auth-change deterministically for unit tests.

interfaces.name: MonitoringCoordinatorProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol MonitoringCoordinatorProtocol: Sendable { func recomputeAndReconcile(now: Date) async throws; func handleAuthorizationChanged() async; func handleAppDidBecomeActive() async; func handleAppWillEnterForeground() async }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Only service allowed to reconcile desired state against OS-monitored regions.

interfaces.name: NotificationHandling
interfaces.signature: protocol NotificationHandling: Sendable { func registerCategories() async; func scheduleResurfaceNotification(for place: PlaceRecord, episodeID: UUID, body: String) async throws; func recordDeliveredNotification(placeID: PlaceID, notificationID: String, at: Date) async throws; func handleNotificationAction(placeID: PlaceID, actionIdentifier: String, at: Date) async throws }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Central notification boundary; snooze/dismiss/mark-visited actions attached at the category level.

interfaces.name: EntitlementSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct EntitlementSnapshot: Equatable, Sendable { let hasPro: Bool; let effectiveMonitoringCap: Int; let widgetsEnabled: Bool; let richMediaEnabled: Bool }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. StoreKit output normalized for domain use; effectiveMonitoringCap = tier cap × real 20-region OS ceiling.

interfaces.name: EntitlementServiceProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementServiceProtocol: Sendable { func refreshSnapshot() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func currentSnapshot() async -> EntitlementSnapshot; func purchaseProMonthly() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func purchaseProYearly() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func restorePurchases() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Live-computed from Transaction.currentEntitlements, never a cached launch-time bool.

interfaces.name: DiagnosticsPlaceSnapshot
interfaces.signature: struct DiagnosticsPlaceSnapshot: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: PlaceID; let title: String; let displayState: PlaceDerivedState; let lastDecision: MonitoringDecisionRecord?; let lastNotificationAt: Date?; let occupiesSystemRegionSlot: Bool }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. lastDecision.requiresManualReactivation powers the 'tap to bring it back' affordance on both the queued Library row and this Diagnostics row.

interfaces.name: DiagnosticsServiceProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol DiagnosticsServiceProtocol: Sendable { func appCapabilitySnapshot() async -> AppCapabilitySnapshot; func placeSnapshots() async throws -> [DiagnosticsPlaceSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Feeds Settings/Diagnostics UI.

interfaces.name: WidgetRefreshServiceProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol WidgetRefreshServiceProtocol: Sendable { func scheduleCoalescedReload(reason: String) async; func performForegroundBackgroundReloadIfNeeded() async }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Debounced/batched WidgetKit reloads plus one on foreground/background transition.

interfaces.name: AppRouterProtocol
interfaces.signature: protocol AppRouterProtocol: ObservableObject { func openPlaceDetail(_ placeID: PlaceID); func presentPaywall(source: String); func presentSettings(); }
interfaces.notes: Deep links append into Library path; UI never hardcodes cross-tab navigation.

interfaces.name: capturePlace
interfaces.signature: func capturePlace(_ draft: PlaceDraft) async throws -> CaptureResult
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Single capture use-case entry point shared by Home's capture button and the Share Extension facade.

interfaces.name: ActionEvent
interfaces.signature: struct ActionEvent: Identifiable, Sendable, Codable { let id: UUID; let placeID: UUID; let kind: ActionKind; let occurredAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: Append-only mirror of UserActionEvent.

interfaces.name: ActionKind
interfaces.signature: enum ActionKind: String, Codable, Sendable { case captured, snoozed, dismissed, visited, manuallyPromoted, reactivated, merged }
interfaces.notes: Drives both PlaceStateResolver and the PlaceTimelineEvent narrative feed.

interfaces.name: MonitoringDecisionRecord
interfaces.signature: struct MonitoringDecisionRecord: Identifiable, Codable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let placeID: PlaceID; let evaluatedAt: Date; let score: Double; let disposition: MonitoringDisposition; let reasonCode: String; let reasonText: String; let consumedRegionSlot: Bool; let rankingInputs: [String: Double]; let requiresManualReactivation: Bool }
interfaces.notes: FINAL. requiresManualReactivation is the type-safe distinction between a genuinely cap-queued place (auto-recontests when a slot frees) and a soft-paused one (stays queued until a .reactivate/.manualPromote UserActionEvent postdates this decision) — lives entirely in the persisted audit trail, never inferred from reasonText, never exposed as a new UI-facing case.

interfaces.name: PlaceDerivedState
interfaces.signature: enum PlaceDerivedState: Equatable, Sendable { case active(reason: String), queued(reason: String), paused(reason: PausedSubReason, message: String), snoozed(until: Date, message: String), visited(message: String), dismissed(message: String) }
interfaces.notes: FINAL, exactly the 6 locked Place Detail variants. Soft-pause renders as queued(reason:) with copy like 'didn't seem useful last time — tap to bring it back'; MonitoringDecisionRecord.requiresManualReactivation (not this enum) is what actually stops the engine from silently re-arming it.

interfaces.name: PausedSubReason
interfaces.signature: enum PausedSubReason: String, Codable, Sendable { case permissionRevoked, notificationsDisabled, forceQuitAwaitingReopen, deviceRebootReregistering }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED at exactly the 4 cases from design_discussion/design_handoff. preciseLocationReduced lives in AppCapabilitySnapshot/Diagnostics; noFreshLocation lives in HomeViewState; soft-pause lives in MonitoringDecisionRecord.requiresManualReactivation. None expand this enum.

interfaces.name: PlaceStateResolver
interfaces.signature: enum PlaceStateResolver { static func resolve(place: PlaceRecord, latestDecision: MonitoringDecisionRecord?, capability: AppCapabilitySnapshot, occupiesSystemSlot: Bool, now: Date) -> PlaceDerivedState }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Pure, zero I/O; unit-tested with fixture timestamps. No CoreLocation/UserNotifications import anywhere in this file.

interfaces.name: MonitoringEngine
interfaces.signature: protocol MonitoringEngine: Sendable { func evaluate(places: [PlaceRecord], capability: AppCapabilitySnapshot, effectiveMonitoringCap: Int, recentActions: [UserActionEvent], now: Date) -> [MonitoringDecisionRecord] }
interfaces.notes: Pure ranking function. Never talks to CoreLocation or StoreKit.

interfaces.name: MonitoringReconciler
interfaces.signature: protocol MonitoringReconciler: Sendable { func reconcile(desired: [MonitoringDecisionRecord], observedRegionIdentifiers: Set<String>) -> RegionChangeSet }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Hard-coded clamp — never calls startMonitoring past 20 regardless of engine output.

interfaces.name: RegionChangeSet
interfaces.signature: struct RegionChangeSet: Sendable { let toStartMonitoring: [PlaceRecord]; let toStopMonitoring: [String] }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Output of the reconciler diff.

interfaces.name: LocationProvidingDelegate
interfaces.signature: protocol LocationProvidingDelegate: AnyObject { func didEnterRegion(identifier: String); func didExitRegion(identifier: String); func authorizationDidChange(_ level: LocationAuthLevel) }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. authorizationDidChange must trigger immediate capability recompute + engine re-evaluation, not wait for next launch.

interfaces.name: EntitlementService
interfaces.signature: protocol EntitlementService: Sendable { func refreshSnapshot() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func currentSnapshot() async -> EntitlementSnapshot; func purchaseProMonthly() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func purchaseProYearly() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot; func restorePurchases() async throws -> EntitlementSnapshot }
interfaces.notes: Backed by StoreKit 2 Transaction.currentEntitlements and AppStore.sync(). Never use a launch-time cached bool.

interfaces.name: SubscriptionTier
interfaces.signature: enum SubscriptionTier: Sendable, Codable { case free, pro }
interfaces.notes: Free caps monitored places around 8; Pro caps only at the real iOS region limit.

interfaces.name: PlaceRepository
interfaces.signature: protocol PlaceRepository: Sendable { func saveCapture(_ draft: PlaceDraft) async throws -> PlaceRecord; func fetchAllPlaces() async throws -> [PlaceRecord]; func fetchPlace(id: PlaceID) async throws -> PlaceRecord?; func updatePlace(_ place: PlaceRecord) async throws; func appendUserAction(_ event: UserActionEvent) async throws; func appendNotificationEpisode(_ episode: NotificationEpisode) async throws; func appendMonitoringDecision(_ decision: MonitoringDecisionRecord) async throws; func fetchLatestDecision(for placeID: PlaceID) async throws -> MonitoringDecisionRecord?; func timeline(for placeID: PlaceID) async throws -> [PlaceTimelineEvent] }
interfaces.notes: Single persistence boundary shared by app and extensions. saveCapture must synchronously durably commit before success is surfaced.

interfaces.name: PlaceDraft
interfaces.signature: struct PlaceDraft: Sendable { var latitude: Double; var longitude: Double; var title: String; var source: CaptureSource; var noteText: String?; var photoAssetIdentifier: String?; var voiceNoteURL: URL?; var capturedAt: Date }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Input to saveCapture; title is an editable auto-generated default, never a required typed field.

interfaces.name: PlaceTimelineEvent
interfaces.signature: struct PlaceTimelineEvent: Identifiable, Sendable { let id: UUID; let occurredAt: Date; let narrative: String; let icon: String }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED, additive. Merges MonitoringDecisionRecord + NotificationEpisode + UserActionEvent into a plain-language per-place story for Diagnostics. First to cut under time pressure.

interfaces.name: AppRouter
interfaces.signature: @Observable final class AppRouter { var selectedTab: AppTab; var libraryPath: NavigationPath; var pendingDeepLinkPlaceID: PlaceID?; func handleDeepLink(placeID: PlaceID); func consumePendingDeepLinkIfNeeded() }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED: @Observable, not ObservableObject, project-wide. handleDeepLink appends to libraryPath, never resets it. Root view drives consumePendingDeepLinkIfNeeded() via .onChange(of: pendingDeepLinkPlaceID), not an imperative scenePhase check, so a cold launch from a notification tap can't double-fire or drop the append.

interfaces.name: AppTab
interfaces.signature: enum AppTab: Sendable { case home, library }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Exactly two tabs; Settings/Paywall are always sheets.

interfaces.name: HomeViewState
interfaces.signature: enum HomeViewState: Sendable { case firstRunEmpty, watchful(monitoredCount: Int), degraded(reason: String), locationTemporarilyUnavailable }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. The four locked Home states.

interfaces.name: CaptureButtonPhase
interfaces.signature: enum CaptureButtonPhase: Sendable { case idle, pressed, resolving, committed }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Drives visual state and the accessibility label.

interfaces.name: LibrarySection
interfaces.signature: enum LibrarySection: CaseIterable, Sendable { case activeAndQueued, snoozed, paused, visited, dismissed }
interfaces.notes: FINAL, locked at exactly 5 sections. No separate softPaused section — soft-paused places render inside activeAndQueued using queued's existing row treatment.

interfaces.name: PaywallViewState
interfaces.signature: enum PaywallViewState: Sendable { case pitch, purchasing, restored, failed(String) }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Restore Purchases button always visible in every state.

interfaces.name: DiagnosticsSummaryTier
interfaces.signature: enum DiagnosticsSummaryTier: Sendable { case allSystemsGo, capabilityReduced, monitoringUnavailable }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. capabilityReduced is where reduced-precision-location surfaces, not as a per-place paused reason.

interfaces.name: WidgetRefreshCoordinator
interfaces.signature: protocol WidgetRefreshCoordinator: Sendable { func scheduleCoalescedReload(reason: String) async; func performForegroundBackgroundReloadIfNeeded() async }
interfaces.notes: Debounces WidgetKit reloads to stay within daily budget.

interfaces.name: PersistenceController
interfaces.signature: final class PersistenceController { static let shared: PersistenceController; let container: NSPersistentContainer; func newBackgroundContext() -> NSManagedObjectContext }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Lives in the shared WaylayCore package linked by app/widget/share-extension. NSPersistentHistoryTrackingKey and NSPersistentStoreRemoteChangeNotificationPostOptionKey both true so all three processes merge each other's writes via .NSPersistentStoreRemoteChange.

interfaces.name: DiagnosticsService
interfaces.signature: protocol DiagnosticsService: Sendable { func appCapabilitySnapshot() async -> AppCapabilitySnapshot; func placeSnapshots() async throws -> [DiagnosticsPlaceSnapshot] }
interfaces.notes: Feeds Settings diagnostics UI.

interfaces.name: LocationAuthLevel
interfaces.signature: enum LocationAuthLevel: String, Codable, Sendable, Equatable { case notDetermined, whenInUse, always, denied, restricted }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Domain-owned replacement for raw CLAuthorizationStatus, mapped at the LocationService boundary so data_domain never imports CoreLocation.

interfaces.name: NotificationAuthLevel
interfaces.signature: enum NotificationAuthLevel: String, Codable, Sendable, Equatable { case notDetermined, denied, authorized, provisional, ephemeral }
interfaces.notes: LOCKED. Domain-owned replacement for raw UNAuthorizationStatus, mapped at the NotificationService boundary.
